policies.text: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the show time are eligible for a 90% refund. The remaining 10% is kept as a convenience fee.
Cancellations made between 2 and 24 hours before the show time are eligible for a 50% refund only.
Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the show time are not eligible for any refund.
Approved refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days back to the original payment method used at the time of booking.
UPI and wallet payments are refunded within 2 business days. Credit and debit card refunds may take up to 7 business days depending on the bank.
A maximum of 10 tickets can be booked per transaction. For group bookings above 10, please contact our support team.
Tickets once booked cannot be transferred to another show or date. You must cancel and rebook separately.
Seat selection is available up to 30 minutes before the show. After that, the system auto-assigns available seats.
Recliner seats must be booked at least 1 hour before the show. Walk-in recliner bookings are not available at the counter.
Outside food and beverages are not permitted inside the screening halls. Food courts and in-hall ordering are available at select theaters.
Children below the age of 3 are allowed free entry without a seat. Children aged 3 and above require a full ticket.
We accept UPI, credit cards, debit cards, net banking, and wallet payments. Cash payment is not accepted for online bookings.
